description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

A regular press conference of the Hanno City Mayor will be held on February 20, 2026 (Reiwa 8).

Planned agenda items:

• The 6th Hanno City Comprehensive Promotion Plan Implementation Plan – FY2026 Priority Measures (3rd Hanno City Comprehensive Strategy for Creating Towns, People, and Jobs – draft)

• Draft 8th Hanno City Administrative Reform Outline

• Special provisions regarding compensation for the Mayor and other city staff

• Overview of the FY2026 budget proposal

• Emergency financial measures

• Trial and sounding of food truck and other vendor operations at public facilities

• Opening of the Asu-Okokubo Line (Iwasawa section)

• Plans launching in FY2026

Detailed materials are available as PDFs.

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/soshikikarasagasu/sogoseisakubu/hishokohoka/hisho/hodohappyo/houdouhappyou2025/13138.html
